{{Quote|Not so far away is ''Golden Nyss Shipyards''. Small shipyard. Caters mostly to pirates, smugglers, people like that. Like me. Defense grid with many droid mines discourage attackers. Plus, everybody on Rim finds them useful. They only deal with those they dealt with before—like me.|[[Vilmarh Grahrk]]|<ref name="SW40" />}}
The '''Golden Nyss Shipyards''' was a [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] located in the [[Fellwe sector/Legends|Fellwe sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==History==
Golden Nyss Shipyards catered largely to [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], and other elements of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Fringer/Legends|fringe]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[NT 600]] was built at this [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]].<ref name="SW40" />

During the [[Yinchorri Uprising]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], it was one of the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]]'s first targets. First, they [[Raid on the Golden Nyss Shipyards|stole]] the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] docked there. Then, they destroyed the [[Space station/Legends|station]] altogether. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], the Golden Nyss Shipyards was run by Shipyard Master [[Gzin]].<ref name="SW40" />

{{Station-stub}}
